title: [10 Packs Snap-On Airtight containers with Lids 1000ml (1 Litre) Food Storage Containers, Meal Prep containers with lids- Leak Proof Microwave Freezer Dishwasher Safe Reusable
features: KEEPS FOOD FRESH - Our containers are known for their PREMIUM QUALITY. Airtight lids seal tight to keep food fresh for longer. Great for the office, university, gym, home, travel, or picnics. Our containers are made with more expensive high-quality plastic, so THICKER, STRONGER, and MORE DURABLE than cheaper competitor brands.

MEAL PREP & PORTION CONTROL - 10 packs of stackable containers ideal for portion-controlled diets, leftovers, salads, pasta, and healthy snacks. Each container is perfectly proportioned to help you stick to a balanced diet plan. Each container can store 1L of food. Individual container size = 19cm (l) x 14 (w) x 5.5cm (h)Re-Useable - 10 X Each Container: 1000ml,

MICROWAVE, FREEZER & DISHWASHER SAFE - Made from PREMIUM plastic and BPA-free, these containers can withstand high and low temperatures, so they can be heated up or cooled down. REUSABLE and safe to use in the microwave, freezer, and dishwasher.

SAVE TIME & MONEY - 10-Pack of Bento Boxes features 1 compartment in one container. Each meal prep container can store a total of 1 Litre which is the perfect portion to help you stay full, yet fit and healthy! Airtight Snap-On Lids. NOTE: LID colour may vary, could be greenish to black.
High Quality Food Container Set - NOTE - the lid has to be really pushed on as the fitting is tight and the containers are designed to hold really well
